readme_description: Shows how to use system drawn focus visuals, or to create your own custom focus visuals if the system drawn ones do not fit your needs.
readme_bullets: **Use the system focus visuals in custom controls:** By using UseSystemFocusVisuals and the attached property Control.IsTemplateFocusTarget, you can specify which piece of your control template should draw the focus visuals.
**Create your own focus visuals:** Add back the focus visual states from Windows 8.1 (included in the sample), and set UseSystemFocusVisuals to false to specify your own visuals.
